name: Aki, Denji and Power
description:
Do you know what the best way to spend a sick or sad day is by watching part 3 of JoJo.

It's so beautiful to see the best JoJo group doing shit after shit. Today my day was only good because I spent it watching JoJo, or rather, watching JoJo again.

Hoy no se habla de F1, estoy demasiado cansado para hablar del dominio de McLaren esta temporada.
creator: VERSTAPPEN
